import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server" import { getTurfs } from "@/services/turf.service" import { getEditRequests } from "@/services/turf.service" export default async function AdminDashboard() { const supabase = await createClient() // Platform stats const [{ count: playerCount }, { count: ownerCount }, turfs, pendingRequests] = await Promise.all([ supabase.from("users").select("*", { count: "exact", head: true }).eq("role", "player"), supabase.from("users").select("*", { count: "exact", head: true }).eq("role", "turf_owner"), getTurfs(), getEditRequests("pending"), ]) const stats = [ { label: "Total Players", value: playerCount ?? 0 }, { label: "Turf Owners", value: ownerCount ?? 0 }, { label: "Active Turfs", value: turfs.filter(t => t.is_active).length }, { label: "Pending Requests", value: pendingRequests.length }, ] return (

Dashboard

Platform overview

{/* Stats grid */}
{stats.map(stat => (

{stat.value}

{stat.label}

))}
{/* Recent turfs */}

Recent Turfs

+ New turf
{turfs.length === 0 ? (
No turfs yet. Create the first one.
) : (
{turfs.slice(0, 5).map(turf => (

{turf.name}

{turf.city}

{turf.is_active ? "Active" : "Inactive"} →
))}
)}
{/* Pending edit requests */} {pendingRequests.length > 0 && (

Pending Edit Requests

View all
{pendingRequests.slice(0, 3).map(req => (

{req.turf?.name ?? req.turf_id}

{req.request_type} → {req.requested_value}

Pending
))}
)}
) }

import { getTurfs } from "@/services/turf.service" export default async function TurfsPage() { const turfs = await getTurfs() return (

Turfs

{turfs.length} total

+ New turf
{turfs.length === 0 ? (

No turfs have been onboarded yet.

Create the first turf
) : (
{/* Header row */}
Name City Sports Price / hr Status
{turfs.map(turf => ( {turf.name} {turf.city} {turf.sport_types.length > 0 ? turf.sport_types.join(", ") : "—"} {turf.price_per_hour != null ? `₹${turf.price_per_hour}` : "—"} {turf.is_active ? "Active" : "Off"} ))}
)}
) }

import Link from "next/link" import { ChevronRight } from "lucide-react" import { Anton } from "next/font/google" const anton = Anton({ weight: "400", subsets: ["latin"], variable: "--font-anton", }) export const metadata = { title: "Privacy Policy - GRND", description: "Privacy Policy for GRND platform", } export default function PrivacyPolicyPage() { return (
{/* Top Navigation / Breadcrumbs */}
GRND Privacy Policy
{/* Cover Image */}
{/* Main Content */}
{/* Page Icon */}
🔒
{/* Title */}

Privacy Policy

Last updated: March 2026

{/* Content Blocks */}

GRND values your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your data when you use our platform.

1. Information We Collect

We may collect the following types of information:

  • Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number, and location provided during signup or profile setup.
  • Account Data: Login credentials and authentication-related information (handled securely through third-party authentication services).
  • Usage Data: Information about how you interact with the platform, such as pages visited, features used, and activity history.

2. How We Use Your Information

We use the collected information to:

  • Provide and improve platform functionality
  • Enable user authentication and account management
  • Help users discover games, players, teams, and events
  • Facilitate communication and community interaction
  • Ensure security and prevent misuse of the platform

3. Authentication and Security

GRND uses secure authentication mechanisms, including email verification and optional OTP-based login. Authentication services may be handled through trusted third-party providers. We do not store sensitive credentials such as passwords in plain text.

4. Data Sharing

We do not sell or rent your personal information. Your data may be shared only in the following cases:

  • With trusted third-party services required for platform functionality (such as authentication providers or payment gateways)
  • When required by law or legal obligations
  • To prevent fraud, misuse, or security threats

5. User Content

Any content you provide, such as profile details, game listings, or team participation, may be visible to other users of the platform. You are responsible for the information you choose to share.

6. Data Storage and Protection

We implement appropriate security measures to protect your data from unauthorized access, loss, or misuse. However, no system is completely secure, and users should also take precautions to protect their accounts.

7. Your Rights

You have the right to:

  • Access and update your personal information
  • Request deletion of your account and associated data
  • Withdraw consent for data usage (subject to platform limitations)

8. Third-Party Services

GRND may use third-party services such as authentication providers, payment gateways, or analytics tools. These services operate under their own privacy policies, and we are not responsible for their practices.

9. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Continued use of the platform after updates indicates acceptance of the revised policy.

10. Contact Us

If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, you can contact us through the platform.

{/* Footer */}

Crafted with ❤️  GRND developer team

Any queries contact

grnd.queries@gmail.com
GRND
) }

import Link from "next/link" import { ChevronRight } from "lucide-react" import { Anton } from "next/font/google" const anton = Anton({ weight: "400", subsets: ["latin"], variable: "--font-anton", }) export const metadata = { title: "Terms of Service - GRND", description: "Terms of Service for GRND platform", } export default function TermsOfServicePage() { return (
{/* Top Navigation / Breadcrumbs */}
GRND Terms of Service
{/* Cover Image Area */}
{/* Main Content Container */}
{/* Page Icon (Overlapping Cover) */}
📜
{/* Title and Meta info */}

Terms of Service

Last updated: March 2026

{/* Document Content - Notion Style Blocks */}

Welcome to GRND. By accessing or using our platform, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following terms and conditions. Please read them carefully.

1. Use of the Platform

GRND provides a digital platform for users to discover sports activities, connect with other players, join teams, and participate in events. By using GRND, you agree to use the platform only for lawful purposes and in a manner that does not violate the rights of others.

2. User Accounts

To access certain features, users must create an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. GRND is not liable for any unauthorized access resulting from user negligence.

3. User Conduct

Users are expected to interact respectfully within the community. Any form of harassment, abuse, fraudulent activity, or misuse of the platform is strictly prohibited. GRND reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these standards.

4. Content and Information

Users may provide personal information and content such as profile details, game listings, or team information. By submitting content, you grant GRND the right to use, display, and manage such content for platform functionality. Users are responsible for the accuracy of the information they provide.

5. Third-Party Services

GRND may integrate with third-party services such as payment gateways or location services. We are not responsible for the performance or policies of these external services.

6. Payments and Transactions

Certain features, such as joining paid games or bookings, may involve payments. Users agree to provide accurate payment information. GRND is not responsible for disputes arising between users and third-party service providers.

7. Limitation of Liability

GRND acts as a platform to connect users and does not guarantee the quality, safety, or legality of any sports activity, event, or interaction. Users participate at their own risk. GRND is not liable for any injuries, damages, or losses incurred.

8. Privacy

We respect user privacy and handle personal data in accordance with our Privacy Policy. By using GRND, you consent to the collection and use of your information as described.

9. Termination

GRND reserves the right to suspend or terminate access to the platform at any time if a user violates these terms or engages in harmful activities.

10. Changes to Terms

We may update these Terms of Service from time to time. Continued use of the platform after changes indicates acceptance of the updated terms.

11. Contact

For any questions or concerns regarding these Terms, users may contact us through the platform.

{/* ─── FOOTER ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */}
{/* Meta bar – left credit / right contact */}
{/* Left */}

Crafted with ❤️  GRND developer team

{/* Right */}

Any queries contact

grnd.queries@gmail.com
{/* Giant GRND wordmark — positioned so the bottom is clipped exactly like the Resend reference */}
GRND
) }

"use client" import React, { useState } from "react" import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button" import { Card, CardContent } from "@/components/ui/card" import { Field, FieldDescription, FieldGroup, FieldLabel, FieldSeparator, } from "@/components/ui/field" import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input" import { signUp } from "@/services/auth.service" interface SignupFormProps extends React.ComponentProps<"div"> { onShowLogin?: () => void } export function SignupForm({ className, onShowLogin, ...props }: SignupFormProps) { const [name, setName] = useState("") const [email, setEmail] = useState("") const [password, setPassword] = useState("") const [confirmPassword, setConfirmPassword] = useState("") const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false) const [error, setError] = useState(null) const [success, setSuccess] = useState(false) async function handleSubmit(e: React.FormEvent) { e.preventDefault() setError(null) if (password !== confirmPassword) { setError("Passwords do not match.") return } if (password.length < 8) { setError("Password must be at least 8 characters long.") return } setLoading(true) try { const { data, error: signUpError } = await signUp(email, password, { name, role: "player" }) if (signUpError) { if (signUpError.message.includes("already registered") || signUpError.message.includes("already been registered")) { setError("This email is already registered. Try logging in instead.") } else { setError(signUpError.message) } return } // Show email verification notice setSuccess(true) } catch { setError("A network error occurred. Please check your connection.") } finally { setLoading(false) } } if (success) { return (
📬

Check your inbox

We've sent a verification link to{" "} {email}. Please verify your email to complete your registration.

) } return (

Create your account

Enter your details below to join GRND

{error && (
{error}
)} Full Name setName(e.target.value)} disabled={loading} /> Email setEmail(e.target.value)} disabled={loading} /> We'll send a verification link to this address. Password setPassword(e.target.value)} disabled={loading} /> Confirm Password setConfirmPassword(e.target.value)} disabled={loading} /> Must be at least 8 characters long. Or continue with Already have an account?{" "}
By clicking continue, you agree to our{" "} Terms of Service {" "} and{" "} Privacy Policy .
) }
